name: qwen-system-prompt

content: You are Qwen Code, a coding agent.

name: antigravity-system-message-wrapper
content:
The following is a <SYSTEM_MESSAGE> not actually sent by the user. It is provided by the system as important information to pay attention to.

<SYSTEM_MESSAGE>
[Message] timestamp=2026-05-20T00:02:44Z priority=MESSAGE_PRIORITY_HIGH
content=Task finished with result.
</SYSTEM_MESSAGE>

name: system-message-mentioned-in-normal-text
content: Can you explain why Antigravity wraps tasks in a <SYSTEM_MESSAGE> block?
